acceptance_targets: [ch18-prose-001] PASS if the revised chapter keeps no more than two gesture-adverb 'once' beats across the cited lines and each retained beat carries new character information; FAIL if three or more similar 'once' gesture beats remain in the same pattern.

[ch18-prose-002] PASS if the revised stretch at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:53-71 contains at least three explicit Elsie interiority beats and no run longer than four consecutive paragraphs without interior access; FAIL if the same section still reads as extended external transcript.

[ch18-prose-003] PASS if the revised span around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:369-379 either stays strictly in Noreen-accessible perception or includes a clearly signaled POV transition before any Elsie-internal claim; FAIL if Elsie-private cognition appears without transition.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter keeps no more than two gesture-adverb 'once' beats across the cited lines and each retained beat carries new character information; FAIL if three or more similar 'once' gesture beats remain in the same pattern.
findings.problem: Recurring gesture construction ('verb + once' beat) appears repeatedly and starts to read like a default rhythm marker rather than chosen emphasis.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the repeated beat in and around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:163, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:231, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:307, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:343, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:363, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:379, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:397 with more varied, character-specific physical beats.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised stretch at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:53-71 contains at least three explicit Elsie interiority beats and no run longer than four consecutive paragraphs without interior access; FAIL if the same section still reads as extended external transcript.
findings.problem: There is a 10-paragraph run in the debt-collector sequence with minimal focal interiority, flattening close-third texture into procedural exchange.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:53 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:71, insert Elsie's internal beats (thought/sensation/memory/self-assessment) tied to postpartum state, debt fear, and social humiliation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:369-379 either stays strictly in Noreen-accessible perception or includes a clearly signaled POV transition before any Elsie-internal claim; FAIL if Elsie-private cognition appears without transition.
findings.problem: POV integrity slips in the second scene: after sustained Noreen-centered access, line 377 asserts Elsie's interior evaluative history ('cleanest mercy she had ever given him'), which Noreen cannot directly know.
findings.rewrite_direction: Adjust snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:377 to remain in Noreen-observable inference, or add an explicit POV handoff sentence immediately before it if shifting to Elsie is intended.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the more specific and potentially uncomfortable rendering if it is character-true and causally necessary. Intimacy, bodily risk, and moral compromise must be shown with concrete detail and aftermath, then integrated into later behavior rather than quarantined as a one-scene shock.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a draft abstracts pain, sex, coercion, blood, or economic shame at the exact moment consequence should be embodied, revise by replacing summary with physically and socially specific action tied to POV stakes.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High by default for spoken lines; uncontracted forms are marked choices for period formality, emphasis, or character-specific control behavior.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural engines across adjacent chapters: ensemble social scenes, inventory chapters, information-turn chapters, acted-upon pressure chapters, and aftermath chapters. Vary scene count (2 to 4), dialogue density, and interiority depth so consecutive chapters do not share the same pacing signature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-authentic but readable contemporary English, favoring concrete nouns and precise verbs over lyrical abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, alternating primarily between Elsie and Noreen, with occasional tightly limited deviations only when causal clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Sentence rhythm should alternate compressed pressure bursts with longer observational lines that carry social texture; avoid monotone paragraph cadence.
